name: Add a shirt or item
about: Contribute a new item to the museum collection

labels: contribution
assignees: ''

## Item Details

**Name:** 
<!-- e.g. "State of the Map US 2019", "Null Island", "Mapzen" -->

**Category:** 
<!-- one of: event | concept | company | collection -->

**Year / Year Range:** 
<!-- e.g. 2019, or "2015–2017" for a company range -->

**Location (if event):** 
<!-- e.g. "Minneapolis, MN" -->

**Description:**
<!-- A few sentences about what this shirt/item is and why it matters -->

**Tags:**
<!-- comma-separated, e.g. openstreetmap, sotmus, conference -->

## Photos

<!-- Attach photos directly to this issue. Please include front/back of the shirt if you have them! -->

## Stories

<!-- Any personal stories, historical context, or notable facts about this item? -->

*Thank you for contributing to the Museum of Spatial Shirts!* 🗺️
